name: Baseline assessment for fine-tuning prep (2026-05-29)
description: 300-case baseline suite. Run BEFORE fine-tuning to lock the un-tuned-7B scorecard, then re-run AFTER fine-tuning to measure lift. Covers every shape × difficulty band × bilingual locale. Each case carries ExpectedColumns + ExpectedRowCountDirection + ExpectedRowCount (when known from session 168/176 data) so the deep scorer can score user-quality, not just rc. DO NOT use these questions for training data — eval set is sacred.

statistics.byShape: SEL=10 FLT=22 AGG=16 GRP=11 ORD=9 LIM=9 JOI=19 SET=8 SUB=10 CTE=6 WIN=9 TIM=20 TXT=10 LKP=6 MUL=9 SAF=5 ENR=5 AR=44 BIL=30 DOMAIN=36

schemaNote: Each entry: Code (unique), Question, Shape, Difficulty (easy|medium|hard|multi-part|safety), Locale (en|ar), ExpectedColumns (bare names, scorer uses alias map), ExpectedRowCountDirection (single|many|zero|>0), ExpectedRowCount (data-backed number when known), EntityFocus, MaxLatencyMs (180000 = 3 min).
